findings.description: "不正画面遷移チェック" is missing from s2 hints. The source explicitly lists this as a function of WebView_FormTag in the カスタムタグ一覧 table: "不正画面遷移チェック". Users searching for this feature should be directed to s2 (and s5), but neither section includes it as a hint.
findings.source_evidence: :ref:`WebView_FormTag` | HTMLのformタグ出力 | サブミット制御(ボタンとアクションの紐付け、二重サブミット防止) | 不正画面遷移チェック
